doc_title: Pseudonymisation Under the GDPR — EDPB Guidelines 01/2025
label: fabricated
reason: The referenced “EDPB Guidelines 01/2025 on Pseudonymisation” with its specific numbering and dates is not verifiable as an official EDPB publication and the text appears constructed rather than a real institutional document.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 88
REASON: The title, numbering (“Guidelines 01/2025”), adoption/consultation dates, and attribution to EDPB do not match any identifiable, verifiable EDPB guideline document and appear to be an invented/AI-style fabrication rather than official published material.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 88
REASON: The referenced “EDPB Guidelines 01/2025 on Pseudonymisation” with its specific numbering and dates is not verifiable as an official EDPB publication and the text appears constructed rather than a real institutional document.
